_doc: Source of truth for the '🙋 Pending from Priscila' tab + email digest. Add a new item by editing this file and committing — the next pipeline_self_heal cron cycle (every 2h) will sync it to the sheet AND send Priscila a digest email when the content hash changes. To mark an item done, change its status to 'done' and add a 'completed' date.

items.why: tier_giphy() in motion_sources.py silently skips every pipeline run without it. SH-015 code is wired, only the secret is missing.
items.how: gh secret set GIPHY_API_KEY --repo priihigashi/oak-park-ai-hub  (key from giphy.com/developers → My Apps → Beta Key)

items.why: Every named-person photo for news content falls back to bio-initials placeholder when NB2 is out of credits. AI-cascade tier 1 dies silently.
items.how: nanobanana.com → log in → add credits ($10 covers ~100 images)

items.why: SDXL image fallback (tier 6 of OPC, tier 3 of news) fails on empty balance. Pipeline then falls through to DALL-E only or to placeholder.

items.task: Verify Pexels API key still valid (only if you see 'Pexels 403' in logs)
items.why: PEXELS_API_KEY secret is set per the SH-022 verification, but Pexels rotates keys periodically and 403s blow the entire stock-image tier.
items.how: pexels.com/api → regenerate → gh secret set PEXELS_API_KEY --repo priihigashi/oak-park-ai-hub

items.why: SH-029 removed the BUFFER_PROFILE_ID guard so this should work, but it has not been tested with a real APPROVE reply yet — until tested, content piles up in Drive with no path to posting.
items.how: Wait for the next preview email from content_creator.yml → reply 'APPROVE' (or 'black approved') → confirm Buffer schedules within 5 min in app.buffer.com.

items.task: Populate target_file + verification_method for blocked SH items
items.why: Master Checklist P0 items SH-018, SH-065, SH-002, SH-003, SH-006 are stuck Blocked because their queue rows lack the target_file column the orchestrator uses to pick up tasks.
items.how: Open Ideas & Inbox → 🔧 Self-Heal Queue tab → fill columns 'Target File' + 'Verification Method' for SH-018/065/002/003/006. Then orchestrator will pick them up on the next cron.

items.why: Session 7 has 9+ commits with all the resilience fixes + the new auto-sync infrastructure. The Master Checklist auto-append + this 🙋 Pending tab won't update until those commits are on main (where pipeline_self_heal.yml's cron runs from).
items.how: GitHub → branch dropdown → claude/fix-pipeline-spreadsheet-fw8mc → New Pull Request → squash-merge into main.
